```shellscript
#!/bin/bash
# 遍历 flores101_eval_all 下每个模型文件夹，对每个 2xx/xx2 方向提交 rjob 执行 xComet 评估
# 参考 eval_dsv32.sh (20-27) 和 batch_submit_trans_clg2xx.sh
source /mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/miniconda3/bin/activate
EVALUATION_BASE=${EVALUATION_BASE:-"/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/yileitu/glotmax/flores101_eval_all"}
EVAL_SCRIPT_PATH=${EVAL_SCRIPT_PATH:-"/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/yileitu/glotmax/eval_flores_direction_xcomet.sh"}
GPU_NUM=${GPU_NUM:-1}
MEMORY=${MEMORY:-160000}
CPU_NUM=${CPU_NUM:-12}
TASK_TYPE=${TASK_TYPE:-"normal"}
BACKOFF_LIMIT=${BACKOFF_LIMIT:-1}
# 从 {model_dir}/{direction}/{first_pair}/ 下取得 model-name（如 aya-expanse-8b）
# 路径示例: flores101_eval_all/Aya-Expanse-8B/ar2xx/ar2af/aya-expanse-8b
get_model_name_from_direction() {
    local dir_path="$1"
    local first_pair
    first_pair=$(ls -1 "${dir_path}" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [[ -n "$first_pair" ]] && [[ -d "${dir_path}/${first_pair}" ]]; then
        local model_sub
        model_sub=$(ls -1 "${dir_path}/${first_pair}" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
        echo "${model_sub}"
    fi
}
# 遍历模型文件夹（排除非目录文件）
for MODEL_DIR in "${EVALUATION_BASE}"/*/; do
    [[ -d "$MODEL_DIR" ]] || continue
    MODEL_FOLDER_NAME=$(basename "${MODEL_DIR}")
    # 遍历 2xx 或 xx2 方向目录
    for DIRECTION_DIR in "${MODEL_DIR}"*2xx "${MODEL_DIR}"xx2*; do
        [[ -d "$DIRECTION_DIR" ]] || continue
        DIRECTION=$(basename "${DIRECTION_DIR}")
        # 仅保留 *2xx 或 xx2* 格式的方向目录
        if [[ "$DIRECTION" != *2xx ]] && [[ "$DIRECTION" != xx2* ]]; then
            continue
        fi
        MODEL_NAME=$(get_model_name_from_direction "${DIRECTION_DIR}")
        if [[ -z "$MODEL_NAME" ]]; then
            echo "Warning: no model-name found in ${DIRECTION_DIR}, skip"
            continue
        fi
        OUTPUT_DIR="${DIRECTION_DIR}"
        TASK_NAME="flores_xcomet_${MODEL_FOLDER_NAME}_${DIRECTION}"
        echo "============================================================"
        echo "提交 xComet 评估任务"
        echo "============================================================"
        echo "作业名称: ${TASK_NAME}"
        echo "模型名: ${MODEL_NAME}"
        echo "方向: ${DIRECTION}"
        echo "输出路径: ${OUTPUT_DIR}"
        echo "GPU: ${GPU_NUM} | CPU: ${CPU_NUM} | 内存: ${MEMORY}"
        echo "============================================================"
        if [[ "${TASK_TYPE}" == "normal" ]]; then
            rjob submit \
                --name="${TASK_NAME}" \
                --gpu=${GPU_NUM} \
                --memory="${MEMORY}" \
                --cpu="${CPU_NUM}" \
                --task-type="${TASK_TYPE}" \
                --charged-group="codex_gpu" \
                --private-machine=group \
                --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/yuanfei:/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei \
                --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/large-model-center-share-weights:/mnt/shared-storage-user/large-model-center-share-weights \
                --image=registry.h.pjlab.org.cn/ailab-codex/gongjingyang-workspace:0908 \
                --host-network=true \
                --backoff_limit="${BACKOFF_LIMIT}" \
                --restart-policy="restartjobonfailure" \
                --termination-grace-period-seconds="30" \
                --enable-sshd \
                -- bash "${EVAL_SCRIPT_PATH}" "${MODEL_NAME}" "${OUTPUT_DIR}" "${DIRECTION}"
        else
            rjob submit \
                --name="${TASK_NAME}" \
                --gpu=${GPU_NUM} \
                --memory="${MEMORY}" \
                --cpu="${CPU_NUM}" \
                --task-type="${TASK_TYPE}" \
                --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/yuanfei:/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei \
                --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/large-model-center-share-weights:/mnt/shared-storage-user/large-model-center-share-weights \
                --image=registry.h.pjlab.org.cn/ailab-codex/gongjingyang-workspace:0908 \
                --host-network=true \
                --backoff_limit="${BACKOFF_LIMIT}" \
                --restart-policy="restartjobonfailure" \
                --termination-grace-period-seconds="30" \
                --enable-sshd \
                -- bash "${EVAL_SCRIPT_PATH}" "${MODEL_NAME}" "${OUTPUT_DIR}" "${DIRECTION}"
        fi
        echo "✅ 已提交: ${TASK_NAME}"
        echo ""
    done
done
echo "============================================================"
echo "全部任务提交完成"
echo "============================================================"
```
```shellscript
EVALUATION_BASE下面
```
我只想指定一部分模型名称遍历，创建一个list，比如遍历flores101_eval_all/Aya-Expanse-8B和flores101_eval_all/Aya-Expanse-32B

你可以通过定义一个**数组（Array）**来指定具体的模型文件夹名称，然后遍历这个数组即可。

以下是修改后的脚本。主要改动是替换了原本的 `for MODEL_DIR in "${EVALUATION_BASE}"/*/; do` 循环，改为遍历自定义的 `TARGET_FOLDERS` 列表：

```shellscript
#!/bin/bash
# 遍历 flores101_eval_all 下【指定的】模型文件夹，对每个 2xx/xx2 方向提交 rjob 执行 xComet 评估
source /mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/miniconda3/bin/activate

EVALUATION_BASE=${EVALUATION_BASE:-"/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/yileitu/glotmax/flores101_eval_all"}
EVAL_SCRIPT_PATH=${EVAL_SCRIPT_PATH:-"/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei/yileitu/glotmax/eval_flores_direction_xcomet.sh"}

GPU_NUM=${GPU_NUM:-1}
MEMORY=${MEMORY:-160000}
CPU_NUM=${CPU_NUM:-12}
TASK_TYPE=${TASK_TYPE:-"normal"}
BACKOFF_LIMIT=${BACKOFF_LIMIT:-1}

# ============================================================
# 【修改处】在这里指定你想遍历的模型文件夹名称列表
# ============================================================
TARGET_FOLDERS=(
    "Aya-Expanse-8B"
    "Aya-Expanse-32B"
    # "Qwen2.5-7B"  # 可以继续添加
)

# 从 {model_dir}/{direction}/{first_pair}/ 下取得 model-name
get_model_name_from_direction() {
    local dir_path="$1"
    local first_pair
    first_pair=$(ls -1 "${dir_path}" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [[ -n "$first_pair" ]] && [[ -d "${dir_path}/${first_pair}" ]]; then
        local model_sub
        model_sub=$(ls -1 "${dir_path}/${first_pair}" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
        echo "${model_sub}"
    fi
}

# 遍历指定的模型列表
for MODEL_FOLDER_NAME in "${TARGET_FOLDERS[@]}"; do
    # 拼接完整的模型目录路径
    MODEL_DIR="${EVALUATION_BASE}/${MODEL_FOLDER_NAME}"

    # 检查目录是否存在
    if [[ ! -d "$MODEL_DIR" ]]; then
        echo "Warning: Directory not found: ${MODEL_DIR}, skipping..."
        continue
    fi

    # 遍历 2xx 或 xx2 方向目录
    for DIRECTION_DIR in "${MODEL_DIR}"/*2xx "${MODEL_DIR}"/xx2*; do
        # 注意：这里加了/在MODEL_DIR后面，确保路径拼接正确
        # 通配符 expansion 如果没匹配到文件，可能原样返回字符串，需判断是否存在
        [[ -d "$DIRECTION_DIR" ]] || continue
        
        DIRECTION=$(basename "${DIRECTION_DIR}")
        
        # 二次确认目录名格式（虽然通配符限制了，但为了保险保留逻辑）
        if [[ "$DIRECTION" != *2xx ]] && [[ "$DIRECTION" != xx2* ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        MODEL_NAME=$(get_model_name_from_direction "${DIRECTION_DIR}")
        if [[ -z "$MODEL_NAME" ]]; then
            echo "Warning: no model-name found in ${DIRECTION_DIR}, skip"
            continue
        fi

        OUTPUT_DIR="${DIRECTION_DIR}"
        TASK_NAME="flores_xcomet_${MODEL_FOLDER_NAME}_${DIRECTION}"

        echo "============================================================"
        echo "提交 xComet 评估任务"
        echo "============================================================"
        echo "作业名称: ${TASK_NAME}"
        echo "模型名: ${MODEL_NAME}"
        echo "方向: ${DIRECTION}"
        echo "输出路径: ${OUTPUT_DIR}"
        echo "GPU: ${GPU_NUM} | CPU: ${CPU_NUM} | 内存: ${MEMORY}"
        echo "============================================================"

        if [[ "${TASK_TYPE}" == "normal" ]]; then
            rjob submit \
                --name="${TASK_NAME}" \
                --gpu=${GPU_NUM} \
                --memory="${MEMORY}" \
                --cpu="${CPU_NUM}" \
                --task-type="${TASK_TYPE}" \
                --charged-group="codex_gpu" \
                --private-machine=group \
                --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/yuanfei:/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei \
                --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/large-model-center-share-weights:/mnt/shared-storage-user/large-model-center-share-weights \
                --image=registry.h.pjlab.org.cn/ailab-codex/gongjingyang-workspace:0908 \
                --host-network=true \
                --backoff_limit="${BACKOFF_LIMIT}" \
                --restart-policy="restartjobonfailure" \
                --termination-grace-period-seconds="30" \
                --enable-sshd \
                -- bash "${EVAL_SCRIPT_PATH}" "${MODEL_NAME}" "${OUTPUT_DIR}" "${DIRECTION}"
        else
            rjob submit \
                --name="${TASK_NAME}" \
                --gpu=${GPU_NUM} \
                --memory="${MEMORY}" \
                --cpu="${CPU_NUM}" \
                --task-type="${TASK_TYPE}" \
                --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/yuanfei:/mnt/shared-storage-user/yuanfei \
                --mount=gpfs://gpfs1/large-model-center-share-weights:/mnt/shared-storage-user/large-model-center-share-weights \
                --image=registry.h.pjlab.org.cn/ailab-codex/gongjingyang-workspace:0908 \
                --host-network=true \
                --backoff_limit="${BACKOFF_LIMIT}" \
                --restart-policy="restartjobonfailure" \
                --termination-grace-period-seconds="30" \
                --enable-sshd \
                -- bash "${EVAL_SCRIPT_PATH}" "${MODEL_NAME}" "${OUTPUT_DIR}" "${DIRECTION}"
        fi
        echo "✅ 已提交: ${TASK_NAME}"
        echo ""
    done
done

echo "============================================================"
echo "指定任务提交完成"
echo "============================================================"
```

### 修改说明：

1.  **添加 `TARGET_FOLDERS` 数组**：在脚本开头定义了具体的文件夹名称列表。
2.  **修改主循环**：将 `for MODEL_DIR in "${EVALUATION_BASE}"/*/; do` 改为了 `for MODEL_FOLDER_NAME in "${TARGET_FOLDERS[@]}"; do`。
3.  **手动拼接路径**：在循环内部，使用 `MODEL_DIR="${EVALUATION_BASE}/${MODEL_FOLDER_NAME}"` 来获取完整路径，并增加了一个 `if [[ ! -d ... ]]` 判断来防止拼写错误导致路径不存在。
4.  **微调子循环路径**：在原来的 `*2xx` 前补全了路径分隔符，写成 `"${MODEL_DIR}"/*2xx` 以确保路径正确。
